updateMessage: New Subtitle Style panel in the player, download history, redesigned settings menu, and several bug fixes.
fallbackMessage: No streams available. Please try again later.

sections.title: What's New
items: Subtitle Style panel in the player — adjust position, size, delay, text color, border, and font
Subtitle style settings are now saved across sessions
Downloaded videos history — downloaded videos watch history  are remembered after closing

sections.title: Improvements
items: Completely redesigned player settings menu with drill-down panels
Settings menu now shrinks to fit content instead of showing a blank gap
Source preference is now correctly saved when using Remember my choice

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed subtitle style settings showing wrong defaults for existing users
Fixed subtitle delay not being applied when opening the player
Fixed some issues with stream URL for Orbit and Fox providers
Fixed Remember my choice not working on stream selection
Fixed inability to scroll the Because You Watched row
